calculated_fields.name: Achieved Quota
calculated_fields.formula:
if SUM([Achievement (copy)]) >= [Parameters].[New Quota] then "100% +"
elseif SUM([Achievement (copy)]) >= 0.75 * [Parameters].[New Quota] then "75-100%"
elseif SUM([Achievement (copy)]) >= 0.5 * [Parameters].[New Quota] then "50-75%"
else "Below 50%" end

calculated_fields.name: Sort by field
calculated_fields.formula:
if [Parameters].[Parameter 1 1]="Names" then 0
elseif [Parameters].[Parameter 1 1]="% quota descending" then -[Calculation_0440925131659539]
else [Calculation_0440925131659539] end

calculated_fields.name: Ship Status
calculated_fields.formula:
if [Calculation_0831103151444568]> [Calculation_6861103170623145] then "Shipped Late" 
elseIF [Calculation_0831103151444568]= [Calculation_6861103170623145] then "Shipped On Time"
Else "Shipped Early" end

calculated_fields.name: Days to Ship Scheduled
calculated_fields.formula:
CASE  [Ship Mode]
WHEN "Same Day" THEN 0
WHEN "First Class" THEN 1
WHEN "Second Class" THEN 3
WHEN "Standard Class" THEN 6
END

calculated_fields.name: Order Profitable?
calculated_fields.formula:
{fixed [Order ID]:sum([Profit])}>0
// calculates the profit at the order level

calculated_fields.name: Sales above Target?
calculated_fields.formula: If Sum([Sales])>SUM([federated.0hgpf0j1fdpvv316shikk0mmdlec].[Sales Target]) then "Above Target" else "Below Target" end
